message:
fix: add per-bead file locking to prevent read-modify-write races (gt-joazs)

CreateOrReopenAgentBead, ResetAgentBeadForReuse, UpdateAgentDescriptionFields,
and CloseAndClearAgentBead all perform non-atomic Show-Modify-Update sequences.
Between Show and Update, a concurrent caller can modify the bead, causing lost
updates. This is particularly dangerous during rapid nuke-respawn cycles where
Witness nuke and Manager re-spawn can overlap.

Adds lockAgentBead() using gofrs/flock (already a dependency) to serialize
access per agent bead ID. Lock files are stored in .beads/.locks/ alongside
the beads database.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
